commentary_text: The model sees Ecuador as a heavy favorite at 55%, but the sportsbook consensus backs that win probability down to 40%, a gap of 15 percentage points. This hedging toward the draw (34% vs. the model's 28%) and toward an Ivory Coast upset (27% vs. 17%) suggests the market may be pricing in recent form, lineup changes, or injury concerns that the model's Elo foundation cannot capture. Ecuador remains the consensus pick, but real-money flows are betting on tighter margins than the statistical baseline implies. The dashboard flags this divergence without adjudicating which assessment is more sound.
